evidence.snippet:
Mesh Rider Radios
=================
Our Mesh Rider radios are available in multiple use-case optimized form factors and operate in a wide range of multiband frequency combinations. We specialize in providing resilient connectivity for advanced robotics systems for defense and commercial applications.
Nothing connects drones and robotics better than Mesh Rider.

### Mesh Rider OS
Our patented mobile mesh technology is built for the most demanding, high-mobility environments. With a cutting-edge waveform, Mesh Rider is the intelligence behind our wireless platform delivering ultra-reliable, low-latency, high-speed datalinks across long distances. **Mesh Rider is designed for** resilient communications in complex, mission-critical operations.
[Learn More](https://doodlelabs.com/technology/#mesh-rider-os)

items.notes: Mesh Rider Radio datalinks for drones and robotics — primary product line

Doodle Labs LLC
13274 Fiji Way
Marina Del Rey, CA 90292

Our Mesh Rider radios are available in multiple use-case optimized form factors and operate in a wide range of multiband frequency combinations. We specialize in providing resilient connectivity for advanced robotics systems for defense and commercial applications.
Nothing connects drones and robotics better than Mesh Rider.

The **Astro** by **Freefly Systems** is a highly adaptable, NDAA-compliant drone built for demanding commercial, industrial, and government missions. With **Doodle Labs’ RM-1700-22M3 Mini Mesh Rider Radio** integrated into its communications stack, Astro delivers long-range, high-bandwidth, and resilient connectivity across complex environments. The result: a future-ready UAS platform trusted for BVLOS operations, real-time inspection, and data-heavy aerial workflows.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Makes mesh radio components integrated into drones by OEMs (Freefly, Teal, etc.)

Doodle Labs’ Helix Mesh Rider Radio is on DIU’s [Blue UAS Framework cleared components list](https://doodlelabs.com/how-doodle-labs-helix-mesh-rider-radio-achieves-blue-uas-compliance/), fully-certified for DoD and international use without restriction.
All Doodle Labs products are fully NDAA compliant and Helix Mesh Rider® Radio is specifically designed to [comply with Blue UAS Architecture](https://doodlelabs.com/government-defense/).
NDAA-compliant radios, on the Blue UAS Framework, and certified for Commercial and Defense use globally.

tagline: Produces ultra-lightweight mesh radios (Nano², Mini, OEM, Wearable) delivering 80 Mbps over 50+ km for small unmanned systems, with electronic-warfare resilience and configurable waveforms. NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS Framework certified; selected for U.S. Army Short Range Reconnaissance program. Production-ready across multiple form factors; public evidence supports claims but scalability to contested multi-platform environments requires field validation.
